prompt: Create a vertical cinematic fine-art portrait of a young East Asian woman in an elegant dark floral gown, set against a deep matte black background. The woman has short wavy black bob with soft bangs, porcelain skin, delicate makeup, and a calm melancholic expression, looking down and to the right rather than at the viewer. Her shoulders are bare under sheer black tulle, with a lace-like black choker and embroidered blossoms across the bodice. Around and behind her, compose an ornate Japanese-inspired abstract collage: exactly 5 prominent white satin ribbon streams spiraling vertically through the image, 7 large visible cream or white flowers, 4 red or rust circular paper fan/disc motifs, 3 dark folding fan shapes, many fine gold botanical line drawings, thin looping gold arcs, scattered bronze ink splatters, antique beige paper textures, and layered dried-flower silhouettes. The main decorative column rises from the lower center to the upper left, while the portrait occupies the lower-right third. Use a luxurious dark palette of black, ivory, antique gold, sepia, muted red, and warm bronze. Lighting should be dramatic and soft, with the face and shoulder gently illuminated from the front-left, glossy highlights on skin, and surrounding collage elements fading into shadow. Style: ultra-detailed photorealistic fashion editorial mixed with Japanese paper collage, lacquerware elegance, wabi-sabi textures, high contrast, shallow depth of field, no text, no watermark, no border.
promptEn: Create a vertical cinematic fine-art portrait of a young East Asian woman in an elegant dark floral gown, set against a deep matte black background. The woman has short wavy black bob with soft bangs, porcelain skin, delicate makeup, and a calm melancholic expression, looking down and to the right rather than at the viewer. Her shoulders are bare under sheer black tulle, with a lace-like black choker and embroidered blossoms across the bodice. Around and behind her, compose an ornate Japanese-inspired abstract collage: exactly 5 prominent white satin ribbon streams spiraling vertically through the image, 7 large visible cream or white flowers, 4 red or rust circular paper fan/disc motifs, 3 dark folding fan shapes, many fine gold botanical line drawings, thin looping gold arcs, scattered bronze ink splatters, antique beige paper textures, and layered dried-flower silhouettes. The main decorative column rises from the lower center to the upper left, while the portrait occupies the lower-right third. Use a luxurious dark palette of black, ivory, antique gold, sepia, muted red, and warm bronze. Lighting should be dramatic and soft, with the face and shoulder gently illuminated from the front-left, glossy highlights on skin, and surrounding collage elements fading into shadow. Style: ultra-detailed photorealistic fashion editorial mixed with Japanese paper collage, lacquerware elegance, wabi-sabi textures, high contrast, shallow depth of field, no text, no watermark, no border.
promptZh: 创作一张竖构图的电影感艺术人像，描绘一位身着优雅深色花卉礼服的东亚年轻女性，背景为深哑光黑色。女性留着 带有柔和刘海的黑色短波波头，拥有瓷器般的肌肤、精致的妆容，神情平静而忧郁，视线看向右下方而非直视镜头。她身着透明黑色薄纱，露出双肩，佩戴蕾丝风格的黑色颈圈，胸前绣有花朵。在她周围及身后，构思一幅华丽的日式抽象拼贴画：画面中精准分布 5 条垂直螺旋上升的白色缎带、7 朵清晰可见的奶油色或白色花朵、4 个红色或铁锈色的圆形纸扇/圆盘图案、3 个深色折扇形状、大量精细的金色植物线条画、纤细的金色弧线、零星的青铜色墨迹、古董米色纸张纹理以及层叠的干花剪影。主要的装饰柱从左下方向左上方延伸，人像占据画面的右下三分之一。采用奢华的深色调，包括黑色、象牙白、古董金、棕褐色、柔和红和暖青铜色。光影效果应戏剧化且柔和，面部和肩部从左前方轻柔受光，皮肤带有光泽感，周围的拼贴元素逐渐隐入阴影中。风格：超细节写实时尚大片，融合日式纸艺拼贴、漆器美学、侘寂纹理，高对比度，浅景深，无文字，无水印，无边框。
